scene_title: Manuscrito medieval com ser mecanico falante
narrative_beat: Iluminura de ser com engrenagens e volutas carmesim

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid medieval illuminated manuscript page depicting mechanical being with gold and bronze gears with open mouth emitting crimson ornate speech scrolls representing spoken words in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the mechanical being's open mouth emitting crimson speech scrolls
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated server racks in data center in background
props: mechanical being with gold and bronze gears
open mouth with crimson speech scrolls

environment.location: medieval scriptorium meets modern data center

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, warm amber highlights
style.texture_detail: heavy 35mm grain, parchment and bronze texture

mood.emotion: medieval artist prophetically illustrated AI speech

symbolism.primary: the illuminator who drew a talking machine eight centuries before it existed
symbolism.secondary: speech scrolls as TTS output rendered in medieval visual language

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
